Example Digital Services Inc. collects the following categories of personal information from users of our platform
**Account data**: name, email address, password hash, account creation date
**Communications data**: customer support tickets, email correspondence
We collect personal information directly from users upon account registration and indirectly through automated tracking technologies on our platform
Example Digital Services Inc. relies on the following legal bases for processing personal information

extraction_hints.snippet: Example Digital Services Inc. maintains the following technical and organizational controls
Example Digital Services Inc. maintains the following technical and organizational controls
Access to personal data systems is restricted to authorized personnel and enforced by role-based access controls and multi-factor authentication
Employees with access to personal information are required to complete privacy training annually and are subject to confidentiality agreements
We maintain an incident response plan requiring notification to the Office of the Privacy Commissioner of Canada within 72 hours of discovery of a reportable breach
Account data is retained for the duration of the user's account and for 7 years following account closure
Example Digital Services Inc. shall respond to such requests within 30 days of receipt
Email: privacy@example.org

controls.description: All personal information is encrypted at rest using AES-256 and in transit using TLS 1.3
Access to personal data systems is restricted to authorized personnel and enforced by role-based access controls and multi-factor authentication
Our platform undergoes annual penetration testing conducted by an independent third party
Employees with access to personal information are required to complete privacy training annually and are subject to confidentiality agreements
We maintain an incident response plan requiring notification to the Office of the Privacy Commissioner of Canada within 72 hours of discovery of a reportable breach

evidence_packets.snippet: **Effective Date:** March 1, 2026

This Privacy Policy describes how Example Digital Services Inc. collects, uses, discloses, and protects personal information in accordance with the Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act, S.C

This Privacy Policy describes how Example Digital Services Inc. collects, uses, discloses, and protects personal information in accordance with the Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act, S.C
Example Digital Services Inc. collects the following categories of personal information from users of our platform
**Account data**: name, email address, password hash, account creation date
**Payment data**: billing address, last four digits of payment card (full card data processed by our PCI-DSS certified payment processor, Example Payments Corp.)
**Communications data**: customer support tickets, email correspondence
We collect personal information directly from users upon account registration and indirectly through automated tracking technologies on our platform
Example Digital Services Inc. relies on the following legal bases for processing personal information
**Consent**: Users must expressly consent to the collection and use of their personal information for marketing communications by checking an opt-in box at registration
**Legitimate interests**: Usage analytics and platform security monitoring are conducted under our legitimate interests, subject to users' right to object
**Legitimate interests**: Usage analytics and platform security monitoring are conducted under our legitimate interests, subject to users' right to object
Users may withdraw consent to marketing communications at any time by clicking the unsubscribe link in any marketing email or by contacting privacy@example.org
Example Digital Services Inc. uses collected personal information for the following purposes
To send marketing communications where the user has given express consent
Example Digital Services Inc. transfers personal information to the following third parties
**Example Payments Corp.**: receives payment data for payment processing
**Stacklayer Cloud Inc.**: hosts our platform infrastructure and database servers in Canada
**Insightful Analytics Ltd.**: receives pseudonymised usage data for aggregate analytics
**Meridian Support Systems Inc.**: receives communications data for customer support ticketing

Personal information is not transferred outside Canada except to Stacklayer Cloud Inc.'s disaster recovery facilities in the United States, which are subject to equivalent contractual protections under cross-border data transfer agreements

Personal information is not transferred outside Canada except to Stacklayer Cloud Inc.'s disaster recovery facilities in the United States, which are subject to equivalent contractual protections under cross-border data transfer agreements
Example Digital Services Inc. maintains the following technical and organizational controls
Example Digital Services Inc. maintains the following technical and organizational controls
All personal information is encrypted at rest using AES-256 and in transit using TLS 1.3
Access to personal data systems is restricted to authorized personnel and enforced by role-based access controls and multi-factor authentication
Access to personal data systems is restricted to authorized personnel and enforced by role-based access controls and multi-factor authentication
Our platform undergoes annual penetration testing conducted by an independent third party
Employees with access to personal information are required to complete privacy training annually and are subject to confidentiality agreements
Employees with access to personal information are required to complete privacy training annually and are subject to confidentiality agreements
Employees with access to personal information are required to complete privacy training annually and are subject to confidentiality agreements
We maintain an incident response plan requiring notification to the Office of the Privacy Commissioner of Canada within 72 hours of discovery of a reportable breach
We maintain an incident response plan requiring notification to the Office of the Privacy Commissioner of Canada within 72 hours of discovery of a reportable breach
We maintain an incident response plan requiring notification to the Office of the Privacy Commissioner of Canada within 72 hours of discovery of a reportable breach
Account data is retained for the duration of the user's account and for 7 years following account closure
Payment records are retained for 10 years as required by the Income Tax Act (Canada)
Example Digital Services Inc. shall respond to such requests within 30 days of receipt
Example Digital Services Inc. shall respond to such requests within 30 days of receipt
Email: privacy@example.org
